items.title: Bitcoin's crash to $65K triggers $1.8B in crypto liquidations
items.desc: Bitcoin plunged to nine-week lows around $65,000, wiping out $1.8 billion in crypto positions and raising fears of a deeper move toward $60,000.

items.desc: According to the OECD forecast, Israel's economy will recover from the war, but geopolitical risks and a deficit that will jump to 5.3% could affect the economy.

items.title: Gold Slips as Uncertainty Clouds Negotiations to End US-Iran War
items.desc: Gold declined as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over negotiations between the US and Iran to end the war that’s upended energy flows and heightened inflation concerns.
